snippet: Therapeutic heterogeneity limits the efficacy of immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). title: Tumor heterogeneity: development, mechanisms, and therapeutic implications.
snippet: Tumor heterogeneity is a fundamental hallmark of cancer that drives progression, metastasis and therapeutic resistance. title: Real-World Genomic Characteristics and Prognostic Association in Advanced Papillary Thyroid Carcinoma.
snippet: Most thyroid cancers are initiated by alterations activating the mitogen-activated protein kinase (MAPK) pathway and progress via additional genomic events.
